title: Fractional CMO
description: Senior growth leadership for post-PMF startups that need clearer GTM, better acquisition decisions, and more predictable pipeline.
audience: Best for Seed to Series B teams that need senior growth leadership alongside founders, teams, agencies, or existing marketing hires.
promise: You get weekly decision log, pipeline dashboard, and hire profile — artefacts that outlast the engagement, not advisory slides.
outcomes: Growth priorities, reporting, and weekly operating rhythm
Founder messaging and investor narrative support
Team rituals that reduce founder bottleneck
process: Review last 90 days of pipeline data in CRM to name the real growth constraint
Set quarterly growth priorities with decision rules: what to scale, stop, or fix each week
Facilitate Monday pipeline review, Wednesday experiment ship, Friday scale/stop decision
Document weekly cadence, dashboard owner, and handoff checklist by month 3
